title: Analytics Dashboard UI
shortDescription: Build a responsive analytics dashboard with KPI cards, interactive charts, filters, and data tables.
jobsToBeDone: Prototype a product analytics dashboard for stakeholder review
Visualize key metrics with interactive charts and filters
Build a reusable dashboard layout for internal tools
Create a data-driven UI that connects to real APIs

inputs.label: Key Metrics to Display
inputs.example: MRR ($48,200), Active Users (12,847), Churn Rate (3.2%), ARPU ($3.75), Trial-to-Paid Conversion (18.4%), NPS (72)

inputs.label: Charts & Visualizations
inputs.example: MRR trend line (12 months), user growth area chart, churn by cohort heatmap, revenue by plan bar chart, geographic distribution map

inputs.label: Filters & Controls
inputs.example: Date range picker (7d/30d/90d/custom), plan tier filter (Free/Pro/Business), region selector, compare to previous period toggle

inputs.label: Design Preferences
inputs.example: Dark theme, minimal and clean, use Recharts for charts, Tailwind CSS, responsive (desktop-first but mobile-friendly)
